overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character approaches a large 'Welcome to Night City' sign and enters a covered industrial walkway with metal truss structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban plaza with neon signage

events.description: character approaches and enters the covered industrial walkway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain toward the neon-lit entrance gate

entered.detail: large neon sign with pink and blue lettering reading 'Welcome to Night City'
tall industrial structure with red lights and metal platforms
large cylindrical industrial building with illuminated windows
rectangular white light fixtures embedded in the wet pavement
rain-soaked dark pavement reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rain-soaked open plaza at night, approaching a large neon 'Welcome to Night City' sign. The area is surrounded by industrial structures and illuminated by ground lights reflecting off the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with metal truss construction

events.description: lighting shifts from open neon ambiance to enclosed artificial corridor lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the long industrial corridor with metal beams and overhead pipes

entered.detail: overhead metal framework forming the roof and walls of the walkway
X-shaped orange painted metal support beams along the corridor walls
metal grating and concrete floor with embedded light strips
bundle of industrial pipes and cables running along the ceiling
caged industrial lights mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered industrial walkway with orange metal truss supports and overhead piping. The environment shifts from open rain to a sheltered corridor with artificial lighting, metal grating floors, and industrial wall fixtures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched open plaza into the sheltered confines of an industrial corridor. It begins with the character walking across wet asphalt reflecting ground lights, moving steadily toward a towering neon Welcome to Night City sign. As the character advances, the open, rain-soaked environment transitions into a covered walkway, shifting the atmosphere from the elements to a structured interior. The scene then expands into a corridor defined by orange metal truss supports and overhead piping, where the natural rain gives way to artificial lighting and metal grating floors.
